task_description: Implement Repo File Manager screen for GRID/PAINKILLER: getTree API endpoint, PendingChange model + TreeChangeCompiler, RepoTreeOrchestrator, RepoTreeScreen UI with navigation, German labels, atomic commit flow

verification.summary: Domain build and all 27+ tests pass (TreeChangeCompilerTest: 14 tests, RepoTreeOrchestratorTest: 13 tests, plus all existing tests). App module cannot be verified locally (no Android SDK) but CI handles it. Tests exercise actual code paths and would fail if implementation were reverted.
